patch.value: Claim and lock throughput at thousands of concurrent agents: contention stress benchmark + scaling fixes

Throughput child of pm-9rxu. Boundary with pm-dj98: that epic owns correctness races at small N (pm-zwib/pm-khdq/pm-bgcu remain its children and are prerequisites for meaningful throughput numbers); this item owns performance at large N. Duplicate check: concurrency audit items measure correctness, not throughput.

Stress scenario in the scale harness drives 1000 parallel agents doing claim --next/update/close against one workspace; measures claim success latency distribution and lock contention; any throughput fixes (lock backoff tuning, claim sharding) land with before/after numbers; zero corruption and zero history drift under the stress run
